meanings.definition: a strong positive emotion of regard and affection
examples: children need a lot of love

meanings.definition: any object of warm affection or devotion
examples: the theater was her first love
he has a passion for cock fighting

meanings.definition: a beloved person; used as terms of endearment
a deep feeling of sexual desire and attraction
examples: their love left them indifferent to their surroundings

meanings.definition: a score of zero in tennis or squash
sexual activities (often including sexual intercourse) between two people
examples: he hadn't had any love in months
he has a very complicated love life

meanings.definition: have a great affection or liking for
examples: She loves her boss and works hard for him

meanings.definition: be enamored or in love with

examples: This student sleeps with everyone in her dorm
Were you ever intimate with this man?
